acceptance.assertion: Grabowski exposes worktree-orient in the Grip registry with receipt output.
Output distinguishes dirty worktrees from stale cleanup candidates without mutating them.
Focused tests cover the new grip and receipt shape.
Output recommends a next safe grip without applying cleanup or checkout mutations.

goal: Implement a read-only worktree-orient grip that summarizes canonical checkout, feature worktrees, dirty worktrees, stale candidates, and next safe grip.

metadata.claim_mode_note: Task claim mode describes implementation repository access; resulting grip effects are documented separately.

title: Add worktree navigation grip
